result.evidence_summary: The Grand Mesa Nordic Council (gmnc.org) hosts the Grand Mesa 10km Classic as part of their annual race series, with a dedicated event page for the 2026 race including registration details and a specific results page for the 2024-2025 edition held on December 28, 2024. Multiple pages on the same site list it consistently in the 2024-2025 and 2025-2026 series schedules. No Worldloppet or FIS listings found, but official site and past results provide strong confirmation.
